title: PDF Viewer continuous scroll — one doc, lazy pages (dbg83)
description:
PDF Viewer workspace now uses a pdf.net-style continuous scroll viewer: one PDF.js document per archive file (136 pages = one load, not 136 URLs), lazy IntersectionObserver page render, intrinsic zoom via canvas resize (no CSS world scale). Per-page highlight SVG overlays remain read-only in the viewer.

Map workspace is unchanged (native iframe sheets, highlights, export). Hard-refresh PipeSync (dbg83). Debug session d9d6c9 logs remain until Mike confirms the fix.
changeLog: One pdf.js doc per archiveStorageKey; lazy page tiles near viewport.
Intrinsic zoom on canvas bitmap; bypass legacy per-page canvas stack.
